description: Static v0 records for official live broadcast and replay availability research. Records are link-first, public-safe, and may include conservative not_verified values where official availability remains unconfirmed.

record_fields.jurisdiction_id: Stable jurisdiction identifier used by the project.
record_fields.country_or_region: Public country, region, or jurisdiction name.
record_fields.racing_types: Array of racing type identifiers covered by the record.
record_fields.provider_name: Official authority, racecourse, broadcaster, or clearly official partner name, or null when unknown.
record_fields.official_live_url: Official live broadcast landing page URL, or null when unknown or not available.
record_fields.official_replay_url: Official replay landing page URL, or null when unknown or not available.
record_fields.geo_restriction: Short neutral geographic restriction note, or null when unknown or not applicable.
record_fields.source_type: Official source type such as authority, racecourse, broadcaster, official_partner, or official_social.
record_fields.evidence_urls: Array of official or clearly official-partner evidence URLs.
record_fields.last_checked: ISO date in YYYY-MM-DD format, or null when not checked.
record_fields.notes: Short neutral public-safe note. Do not include betting data, odds, entries, results, payouts, or video mirrors.

record_template.notes: Initial placeholder. Official live/replay availability not yet audited.

records.notes: JRA evidence covers central racing only; NAR and banei are separate unaudited records.

records.geo_restriction: Live video is Japan-only; VOD is available overseas.
records.notes: NAR pages point users to free Chihokeiba Live; banei is tracked separately.

records.geo_restriction: Chihokeiba Live is Japan-only for live video; VOD is available overseas.
records.notes: Official banei pages link to Chihokeiba Live and provide a public banei theater archive.
HKJC evidence supports Racing Touch/HKJC TV live access for account customers and official race replays.
ERA live-stream landing page supports live coverage; official racecard/result pages include race-replay links for completed races.

records.provider_name: Racing TV / Sky Sports Racing / ITV Racing
records.geo_restriction: ITV online coverage is UK-focused; Racing TV and Sky Sports Racing availability depends on their TV/online subscription terms.
records.notes: Official/partner evidence confirms major UK live coverage through racing broadcasters and free replays on Racing TV; coverage is split across rights holders, so this record avoids claiming one universal live source.
Racing TV states live coverage from all Irish racecourses and free British/Irish replays; live access is a member/subscription product rather than a public embedded stream.

records.geo_restriction: France Galop describes app access as available in France; Equidia live premium coverage is subscription based.
records.notes: France Galop provides official gallop live/replay evidence and points to Equidia for premium live coverage; LeTROT shows official trotting replay links, so cross-code coverage remains provider-split.

records.geo_restriction: FOX/FS1/FS2 and NYRA Bets availability can vary by service, account eligibility, and location.
records.notes: Official evidence supports selected live national/NYRA coverage and Equibase replay access, but U.S. rights are distributed by track, broadcaster, and account provider rather than a single universal public stream.

records.geo_restriction: Woodbine USA page is presented for U.S. viewers; HPIbet account features are Canada/account dependent.
records.notes: Woodbine provides official live and replay landing-page evidence; HPIbet documents account-based live video and replays for broader Canadian horse-racing wagering coverage.

Racing.com confirms free Racing+ login access for live broadcast and on-demand replays for its covered thoroughbred rights; Harness Racing Australia provides an official replay archive for harness racing.

records.geo_restriction: Trackside Freeview coverage is New Zealand terrestrial broadcast; online access may vary.
records.notes: Trackside evidence supports live racing on Freeview/TAB platforms; LOVERACING.NZ supports thoroughbred replays.
4Racing states Racing Today provides live coverage, on-demand replays, and archives via a free registered account.
KRBC official channel has live and clip surfaces; routine full race live/replay availability not verified.

records.geo_restriction: Singapore Pools account and subscription eligibility applies; live streaming is for selected meetings or races.
records.notes: Singapore Turf Club states the final Singapore race meeting was held on 5 October 2024; current official live streaming evidence is Singapore Pools account-subscription access for selected horse-race meetings, with no official replay archive verified.

records.provider_name: Macao SAR Government / Macau Horse Race Company Ltd
records.notes: Official Macao SAR Government evidence states the horse-racing concession terminated on 1 April 2024 and horse-racing activities ceased from that date. No active live coverage or official replay landing page is recorded; old videos, if encountered separately, should be treated only as historical material unless official archive evidence is re-audited.
TJK has an official TJK TV web live page and race-video pages; use landing pages only.
SOREC shows live race access; login evidence applies to VOD replay follow-up.

records.provider_name: Hipódromo Argentino de Palermo / Hipódromo de San Isidro
records.notes: Official racecourse evidence supports Palermo live access and race-video pages plus San Isidro official YouTube live surface; this is not national coverage for every Argentine venue. No direct media URL is stored.

records.provider_name: Jockey Club Brasileiro / TV Turfe / Jockey Club do Paraná
records.notes: Official evidence is split by venue/provider: JCB references TV Turfe, site, Facebook, and YouTube live access for Gávea, while Jockey Club do Paraná provides Tarumã replay links. This should not be treated as one universal Brazil live/replay source.

records.provider_name: Hípica de Panamá / Hipódromo Presidente Remón
records.notes: Official Hipódromo Presidente Remón pages expose separate Carreras en Vivo and Replay landing pages; no direct media URL is stored.

records.provider_name: Hipódromo Chile / Club Hípico de Santiago
records.notes: Official racecourse pages support live signals for major Chilean tracks; official pages also support replay access, but this should not be read as every Chilean venue.

records.provider_name: Hipódromo de Monterrico / Jockey Club del Perú
records.notes: Official Monterrico pages provide a live-signal landing page and official results navigation whose race-detail pages include a Video section; no direct media URL is stored.
Official site navigation links to live and replay landing pages; external video page removed.
Bahrain Turf Club provides official live-stream racing and video gallery landing pages.
QREC site exposes a LIVE surface and video gallery; routine full race live/replay availability not confirmed.
Maroñas/HRU evidence supports VeraTV live access and past-race surfaces from official Maroñas/HRU pages.
Swedish galop authority and ATG evidence support ATG Live and ATG lopparkiv; access requires an ATG account.
Official authority identifies Bet25 as partner; live access requires Bet25 login, while Danish replays are stated as free to view.
Official Jockey Club site provides a public delayed live page and stream archive.
Kincsem Park official navigation links to live coverage and archived galopp and ügető race videos.
Official site and older official news support selected live social streams only; no routine official replay landing page was found.
Krieau pages show an official livestream entry and race-day video links; Austria-wide flat racing coverage was not verified.
Official site links live viewing and local race replay/results pages; wagering platform FAQ also documents live video/replay controls.
Official Caymanas pages provide live-stream and race-replay landing pages; replay listings can depend on page filters or race-date selection.

records.provider_name: Trinidad & Tobago Racing Authority / Arima Race Club
records.notes: Official authority site exposes racing records but no public live or replay landing page was verified; club site was not readable without JavaScript.
Official live-stream page lists live streams, instant replays, and the official BTC YouTube channel.
Official site maintains a video archive for race replays; its LIVE category had no content, so no current live-stream landing page was verified.

records.provider_name: Royal Horse Racing Club / Royal Cavalry
records.notes: Official Royal Horse Racing Club page exposes race videos; no official live landing page was verified.
ZimRacing identifies Mashonaland Turf Club-supplied racing information and maintains a Borrowdale livestream archive.

records.provider_name: Royal Western India Turf Club / Paytm First Games
records.notes: Coverage is limited to RWITC Mumbai/Pune surfaces and should not be treated as national India coverage. RWITC live telecast evidence is login/pass-gated; RWITC also links a video archive landing page.

Coverage is limited to Bangalore Turf Club official surfaces and should not be treated as national India coverage. The official site exposes Watch Liverace and Watch Replay/Racing Videos links; availability may depend on race-day operation.

records.provider_name: Selangor Turf Club / Malayan Racing Association
records.notes: Official Malaysia racing pages and the EQ Sport member app evidence were reviewed, but no official race live-stream or race replay landing page was confirmed. Trackwork/social clips and unofficial betting sites are not treated as race live/replay coverage.

Coverage is limited to Metro Manila Turf Club official surfaces and should not be treated as complete Philippines coverage. The official MMTCI landing page links Live Racing; no official replay landing page was confirmed.

records.provider_name: MASAF / Grande Ippica Italiana / EQU TV
records.notes: Grande Ippica Italiana/EQU TV evidence covers Italian racing programming with live race blocks and Race Play replays; MASAF/Snaitech evidence supports EQU TV as the MASAF-linked production/broadcast surface. No direct stream URLs are recorded.
Deutscher Galopp evidence is limited to German gallop/thoroughbred racing; it should not be applied to German trotting, which is tracked separately.

WETTSTAR identifies official German racing partners and states that German gallop and trotting races are available free via YouTube with past race-day videos archived; betting-account and paid-app options also exist but are not recorded as direct media links.

records.provider_name: Asociación de Hipódromos Españoles / Las Carreras / Movistar Plus+
records.geo_restriction: Movistar Plus+ availability depends on its subscription and territory terms.
records.notes: Asociación de Hipódromos evidence describes Las Carreras as the Spanish horse-racing circuit broadcast on Movistar Plus+. No official national replay landing page was verified in this pass; Zarzuela racecourse replays and Spanish trotting are separate records.

records.provider_name: Hipódromo de la Zarzuela / Las Carreras
records.geo_restriction: Movistar Plus+ availability depends on its subscription and territory terms.
records.notes: Racecourse-specific record: Hipódromo de la Zarzuela pages expose race video links, while live circuit evidence comes from Las Carreras/Movistar Plus+. This must not be treated as complete Spain-wide replay coverage.
Federación Balear de Trot identifies itself as Spain's officially recognized trotting federation and exposes recent race-video links. No routine official live-stream landing page was verified.

Official Belgium Horse Racing links Mons as a Belgian racecourse; audited Hippodrome de Wallonie evidence shows race-day replay links for Mons trot/galop pages, but no official live landing page was verified. This is racecourse-specific evidence and must not be treated as complete Belgium coverage.

Victoria Park Wolvega states that its media team provides a live broadcast during every meeting and links to its YouTube channel for Wolvega Live broadcasts. Coverage is limited to Wolvega harness meetings and must not be treated as national Netherlands coverage or as Duindigt/grass-track coverage.

Suisse Trot publishes free replay/rediffusion video pages for recent Swiss races, with YouTube as the official video surface. No official live landing page was verified in this pass, and the record is limited to Suisse Trot replay evidence.

records.provider_name: White Turf St. Moritz / Swiss Sport TV
records.notes: White Turf's official site identifies event live video/Swiss Sport TV coverage for St. Moritz racing days and publishes official Rennfilme race-film archive pages. This remains event-only St. Moritz evidence, not national Swiss live or replay coverage.

RiksTV describes Rikstoto Direkte as covering trotting and gallop with all Norwegian races live plus a race archive; Allente evidence shows paid-TV access requirements for the add-on package. The App Store listing identifies Rikstoto Play as owned by Norsk Rikstoto and offering live trotting and gallop races. This record covers the shared Rikstoto broadcast surface only and does not make separate free-access claims for Norwegian harness or Øvrevoll gallop.

Suomen Hippos states that Finnish harness-racing broadcasts are shown live through Veikkaus TotoTV, that viewing on Veikkaus.fi is free but requires login to a game account, and that all Finnish harness-race starts are available as recordings in Veikkaus TotoTV's video archive. Paid TV/Ruutu+/C More distribution is listed separately, but the primary audited access path is Veikkaus TotoTV. No Finnish thoroughbred source was verified in this pass.

PKWK is the Polish racing authority, while Tor Służewiec publishes Służewiec iTV as its official internet racecourse television and links its official YouTube channel. The Służewiec page says it broadcasts Służewiec racing live and also carries full broadcasts from Partynice/Wrocław and Sopot, and its results/replays page is an official replay landing page. This is racecourse-network evidence only and must not be treated as complete national Poland coverage or as proof that every Polish racing venue has its own official live/replay surface.
